Settled

Settled

Stop debating. Start swiping.

The group decision-making app that turns "I don't mind, you choose" into a fun, fair answer everyone agrees on.

Why Settled?

👥

Group Decisions

No more endless debates. Everyone swipes, and the app finds what you all agree on.

🎯

Multiple Categories

Films, TV shows, takeaways, restaurants, board games, video games, and activities.

✨

Smart Matches

Our algorithm finds the perfect match based on everyone's preferences.

🔗

Share Results

Deep links to order food, stream films, or book activities directly from the match.

How It Works

1

Create Room

Pick a category and invite your group with a simple code.

2

Swipe

Everyone swipes right on what they like, left on what they don't.

3

Match!

When everyone agrees, you've got your answer. Settled!

Simple Pricing

Start free, upgrade when you need more.

free

Free
  • Create up to 3 rooms per day
  • Up to 4 participants per room
  • Basic categories
  • Standard recommendations
Most Popular

premium

£4.99/month
  • Unlimited rooms
  • Up to 8 participants per room
  • All categories
  • Advanced recommendations
  • Match history
  • Favourites list

group

£9.99/month
  • Everything in Premium
  • Up to 20 participants per room
  • Custom categories
  • Priority support
  • Analytics dashboard
  • Team management
